Essomero lya Budda Islamic Junior
AmakaEbikwata ku ffeOkuyingizibwaWaayoTusisinkane

Amakuru g'Okuyingizibwa

Weegatte ku kitundu ky'essomero lyaffe owe omwana wo ebyenjigiriza bya kisilamu ebisinga obulungi.

Enkola y'Okuyingizibwa

1

Foomu y'Okusaba

Jjuza era waayo foomu y'okusaba n'ebiwandiiko ebyetaagisa.

Pulogulaamu z'Ebyenjigiriza n'Emisolo

Pulogulaamu y'Ebyenjigiriza bya Pulayimale

Ebyenjigiriza bya pulayimale ebitonotono ebigatta entegeka y'eggwanga n'ebyenjigiriza bya kisilamu.

Emyaka: Emyaka 6-13

Emisolo gy'Essomero (Buli Kiseera)

Emisolo gy'okusoma:UGX 450,000
Okwewandiisa:UGX 50,000
Engoye z'essomero:UGX 80,000
Ebitabo:UGX 120,000

Ebyetaagisa

  • ✓Birth certificate
  • ✓Passport photos
  • ✓Previous school reports
  • ✓Medical certificate

Ebiwandiiko Ebyetaagisa

  • 📄Birth certificate
  • 📄Passport photos
  • 📄Previous school reports
  • 📄Medical certificate

Essomero lya Budda Islamic Junior

Okuwa ebyenjigiriza bya kisilamu ebisinga obulungi ebikuza obukugu mu masomo n'okukula mu mwoyo.

Enkuubo ez'Amangu

  • Ebikwata ku ffe
  • Okuyingizibwa
  • Waayo

Amakuru g'Okusisinkana

Budda, Disitulikiti ya Wakiso, Uganda

+256 700 123 456

info@buddaislamic.ac.ug
